title: DIMCP EP_18 711 had NoSoftPretzels for a troll kid
archivePath: CRFW Archive/_Documentation/Videos/2018/Dog is my Copilot/DIMCP EP_18 711 had NoSoftPretzels for a troll kid.mp4
transcript:
[00:00:00.00] Hey, there you go.
[00:00:07.00] Here you go.
[00:00:08.00] Unfortunately, it didn't stop press.
[00:00:11.00] You will have me with two hands.
[00:00:15.00] Thank you.
[00:00:16.00] Is that a great neck?
[00:00:18.00] Yes.
[00:00:24.00] That was a weird scene in there.
[00:00:28.00] I don't think she was too happy about the condensation on the slurpy hat that happened there while we were waiting for the pizza to be actually cooked directly in the 7-11.
[00:00:42.00] She had some weird troll kid living with her.
[00:00:45.00] Maybe her son.
[00:00:47.00] I don't know.
[00:00:48.00] Yep.
[00:00:49.00] I didn't see my bed had a very healthy diet.
[00:00:57.00] Probably not.
[00:00:58.00] Ruff!
